text:
Created attachment 195187
handbook Document

My production system is FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE and  the samba version is samba48-4.8.2 .
It's "service samba start" in the document (29.10. File and Print Services for Microsoft® Windows® Clients (Samba)). But it is wrong, actually it is "service samba_server start".
I want to correct the document to avoid other people meeting the same problem, causing the service to fail to start.
